CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. Enter first to auto-fill Seller's City, State and County. Tip: Use the Copy Address to Contacts link to sync with the Contact record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Enter first to auto-fill Seller's City, State and County.
Tip: Use the Copy Address to Contacts link to sync with the Contact record.
CustomField.label: Seller's New Zip Code
